name: Pile Volcamon
description: One of the evolutions of Volcamon , of which there are said to be seven types. It possesses tremendous power and destructive force, and is well-versed in all sorts of combat techniques, starting with those from pro wrestling . As it evolved, its original massive body was polished even more, transforming it into a smart form suited for hand-to-hand combat. Its Special Moves are using the eruptive power of the volcanoes on its shoulders to slam the enemy into the ground head-first ( Volcanic Driver ), and the strongest fist that can pierce even Chrome Digizoid ( Diamond Fist ).
